Climber 900001

Mount Rainier

Elevation: 14,411 ft / 4,392 m · Washington, United States
Date:Sunday, July 12, 2026
Ascent Type:Successful Summit
Route:Disappointment Cleaver
Trip Report Great climb under blue skies. Turned around a rope team near the summit.
  • Ice axe
  • Crampons
